nodes.title: Auth API
nodes.content: Token refresh requires calling POST /auth/refresh before expired_at. Retry once on 401.

nodes.title: Billing API
nodes.content: Invoice total equals subtotal plus tax minus credits. Tax rate for sandbox region is 8%.

nodes.title: Search API
nodes.content: Search endpoint supports filters: status, owner, created_after. Results are paginated.

nodes.title: Workflow API
nodes.content: Long running jobs move through queued, running, blocked, completed, failed states.

nodes.title: Risk API
nodes.content: Risk score above 0.75 requires manual_review=true and explanatory evidence.
